top_stories.title: Anthropic vs. the Pentagon, the SaaSpocalypse, and why competitions is good, actually
top_stories.description: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turned to OpenAI instead, which accepted and then watched ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295%. As the stakes keep rising, the question remains: how much unrestricted […]
top_stories.author: Theresa Loconsolo, Kirsten Korosec, Anthony Ha, Sean O'Kane
top_stories.content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turned to OpenAI instead, which accepted and then watched ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295%. As the stakes keep rising, the question remains: how much unrestricted […]

top_stories.title: NIH scientists develop "digital twin" of eye cells to understand and treat age-related macular degeneration
top_stories.description: Breakthrough modeling technology reveals how cells lose their organization in leading cause of vision loss.
top_stories.content: Breakthrough modeling technology reveals how cells lose their organization in leading cause of vision loss.

top_stories.title: Learnings from COBOL modernization in the real world
top_stories.description: Delivering successful COBOL modernization requires a solution that can reverse engineer deterministically, produce validated and traceable specs, and help those specs flow into any AI-powered coding assistant for the forward engineering. A successful modernization requires both reverse engineering and forward engineering. Learn more about COBOL in this post.
top_stories.author: Dr. Asa Kalavade
top_stories.content: Delivering successful COBOL modernization requires a solution that can reverse engineer deterministically, produce validated and traceable specs, and help those specs flow into any AI-powered coding assistant for the forward engineering. A successful modernization requires both reverse engineering and forward engineering. Learn more about COBOL in this post.

top_stories.title: Yann LeCun’s New AI Paper Argues AGI Is Misdefined and Introduces Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence (SAI) Instead
top_stories.description: What if the AI industry is optimizing for a goal that cannot be clearly defined or reliably measured? That is the central argument of a new paper by Yann LeCun, and his team, which claims that Artificial General Intelligence has become an overloaded term used in inconsistent ways across academia and industry. The research team […] The post Yann LeCun’s New AI Paper Argues AGI Is Misdefined and Introduces Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence (SAI) Instead appeared first on MarkTechPost.

top_stories.title: AI Arms Race Has Real Numbers: Pentagon vs China 2026
top_stories.description: AI targeting systems executed 900 strikes in 12 hours, a pace that previously took weeks. Maven, Palantir, and frontier models are operational in active conflict. The Pentagon just banned Anthropic and switched to OpenAI while strikes continue. The arms race has numbers now.
top_stories.author: Vinit Mehta
top_stories.content: AI targeting systems executed 900 strikes in 12 hours, a pace that previously took weeks. Maven, Palantir, and frontier models are operational in active conflict. The Pentagon just banned Anthropic and switched to OpenAI while strikes continue. The arms race has numbers now.
